spoilers.text: Y'all wondering why the Leak Room server link wasn't working? The previous server was taken down, so we had to start fresh. Spoiler Central launches tonight! See you all there! Will. misc.title: there’s a scary amount of people who genuinely think bananza isnt on the cartridge. how is the misinformation still this bad after over a year of the console being out vtech88 (@vtech88_the_one) This
misc.text: there’s a scary amount of people who genuinely think bananza isnt on the cartridge. how is the misinformation still this bad after over a year of the console being out vtech88 (@vtech88_the_one) This is why physical media still matters to me. Open the case. Insert the cartridge. Start playing. It takes seconds, just like it did on my Game Boy. Buy it, borrow it, swap it with a friend, it just works. I hope we don't lose this. Video — https://nitter.net/vtech88_the_one/status/2072698554246644150#m
